attributes.description: BASF India Ltd's portfolio consists of six segments: Agricultural Solutions, Materials, Industrial solutions, Surface Technologies, Nutrition & Care and Chemicals.[1] It is a part of BASF group which have ~110,000 employees globally in almost every country in the world. It generated sales of ~59 billion euros in 2020.[2]
